steps.code: <?php require '/wordpress/wp-load.php'; $politics = wp_insert_term('Politics', 'category'); $sport = wp_insert_term('Sport', 'category'); $business = wp_insert_term('Business', 'category'); $uk = wp_insert_term('UK', 'post_tag'); $world = wp_insert_term('World', 'post_tag'); $breaking = wp_insert_term('Breaking', 'post_tag'); $politics_id = is_array($politics) ? $politics['term_id'] : $politics; $sport_id = is_array($sport) ? $sport['term_id'] : $sport; $business_id = is_array($business) ? $business['term_id'] : $business; $uk_id = is_array($uk) ? $uk['term_id'] : $uk; $world_id = is_array($world) ? $world['term_id'] : $world; $breaking_id = is_array($breaking) ? $breaking['term_id'] : $breaking; update_option('pa_engine_settings', array('locking_enabled' => true, 'cloning_enabled' => true, 'syndication_enabled' => true, 'global_priority_offset' => 10)); $rules = array( array('rule_id' => 'politics-uk', 'label' => 'Politics → UK + Breaking', 'priority' => 10, 'active' => true, 'conditions' => array('operator' => 'AND', 'rules' => array(array('type' => 'taxonomy', 'slug' => 'category', 'term_id' => (int)$politics_id))), 'actions' => array('select_taxonomies' => array('post_tag' => array((int)$uk_id, (int)$breaking_id)), 'force_meta' => new stdClass(), 'ui_notices' => array(array('type' => 'info', 'message' => 'UK territory and Breaking tag auto-applied for Politics.')))), array('rule_id' => 'sport-world', 'label' => 'Sport → World', 'priority' => 20, 'active' => true, 'conditions' => array('operator' => 'AND', 'rules' => array(array('type' => 'taxonomy', 'slug' => 'category', 'term_id' => (int)$sport_id))), 'actions' => array('select_taxonomies' => array('post_tag' => array((int)$world_id)), 'force_meta' => new stdClass(), 'ui_notices' => array(array('type' => 'info', 'message' => 'World tag auto-applied for Sport.')))), array('rule_id' => 'business-meta', 'label' => 'Business → Set format wire', 'priority' => 30, 'active' => true, 'conditions' => array('operator' => 'AND', 'rules' => array(array('type' => 'taxonomy', 'slug' => 'category', 'term_id' => (int)$business_id))), 'actions' => array('select_taxonomies' => new stdClass(), 'force_meta' => array('_pa_format' => 'wire'), 'ui_notices' => array(array('type' => 'warning', 'message' => 'Business wire format applied. Verify distribution list.'))))); update_option('pa_taxonomy_map', $rules); echo 'Seed data created: Politics(' . $politics_id . '), Sport(' . $sport_id . '), Business(' . $business_id . '), UK(' . $uk_id . '), World(' . $world_id . '), Breaking(' . $breaking_id . ')';
